title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
